emptyState.title: You don't have any assistants yet
emptyState.description: Create your first AI assistant to automate customer support

steps.1: Select an assistant for training from the list above
steps.2: Upload text with information about your company
steps.4: Ask a question in the chat on the right
steps.5: AI will respond based on the uploaded information

example.label: Example:
example.text: Select "Banking Assistant", upload FAQ about returns, then ask "How to process a return?"
